source: public iTunes lookup API plus prior next-app-direction-research artifacts
safety_boundaries: read-only public App Store/iTunes data only
local docs written under docs/forge-vnext only
no App Store Connect, TestFlight, signing, account, money, IAP setup, public posting, or external mutation

candidates.expected_first_screenshot: Milo's Morning Relay: pet identity/status, due care cards, recent note, vet-packet readiness, mark-care-done/add-note actions, tracking-not-medical-advice microcopy
candidates.retention_loop: morning/evening care or refill/appointment trigger -> complete/snooze care or add note -> timeline/vet packet becomes useful -> next due care/prep returns user
candidates.monetization_believability: medium: DogCat public IAP rows previously captured at $4.49 monthly / $39.99 yearly; future Pro could package multi-pet history, recurring templates, vet packet export, refill insights, household handoff after sync approval

public_apps.name: Pet Care Tracker Dog Cat Log

candidates.expected_first_screenshot: Shop your closet this week: 20-item capsule rail, outfit cards, neglected-piece nudge, cost-per-wear meter, log-today action
candidates.retention_loop: getting dressed/laundry/packing/shopping trigger -> log outfit or inspect capsule -> less decision fatigue and wardrobe utilization insight -> next outfit/reset returns user
candidates.monetization_believability: high relative to candidates: Stylebook paid upfront; Whering/Acloset public IAP/subscription rows previously captured
risks: manual proof may feel fake without real garment photos

candidates.expected_first_screenshot: Before the next trip: older-car card, due-soon lane, last receipt summary, mechanic-packet preview, log-service/update-mileage action
candidates.retention_loop: odometer/service/repair/pre-trip trigger -> log service/update mileage/reset interval -> clearer next due/mechanic conversation/resale history -> next service threshold returns user
candidates.monetization_believability: low_medium: Fuelly public IAP previously captured at $7.99 annual / $0.99 monthly; likely low utility ceiling
